---
name: Language Support Request
about: Request support for a new programming language
title: "[LANG] Add <language> support"
labels: language-support
assignees: ''
---

## Language
<!-- e.g., Ruby, Rust, C#, PHP, Swift, Kotlin -->

## Use Case
<!-- Why do you need this language supported? What project? -->

## Tree-Sitter Grammar
<!-- Does a tree-sitter grammar exist for this language? -->
- **Grammar**: <!-- e.g., tree-sitter-ruby -->
- **Repository**: <!-- Link to tree-sitter grammar repo -->
- **Maintained**: <!-- Yes / No / Unknown -->

## Test Project
<!-- Provide a public GitHub repo we can use for testing -->
- **Repository**: <!-- e.g., https://github.com/rails/rails -->
- **File count**: <!-- Approximate number of source files -->

## Key Language Features
<!-- What language features need parsing? -->
- [ ] Functions/methods
- [ ] Classes/structures
- [ ] Imports/modules
- [ ] Exports
- [ ] Decorators/annotations
- [ ] Generics/templates
- [ ] Other: ___

## Priority
<!-- How important is this to you? -->
- [ ] Critical (blocking my use of Depwire)
- [ ] High (would greatly improve my workflow)
- [ ] Medium (nice to have)
- [ ] Low (interested but not urgent)

## Contribution
<!-- Are you willing to contribute? -->
- [ ] I can help implement this
- [ ] I can help test this
- [ ] I can provide test fixtures
- [ ] I need someone else to implement this
